title: PRINT button in address banner not working
description: The PRINT button was added to the address banner in OwnerAddressTable.vue as part of the UI polish pass, but it has issues when clicked. Needs investigation and fix.

title: Implement Mailing Labels button functionality
description: The Mailing Labels button in DataPanelToolbar.vue currently has a placeholder handler in DataPanel.vue. Needs to generate mailing labels from the current search results, matching the old property.phila.gov behavior.
